scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix orchestrator install && npm --prefix operator-s-console install
scripts.dev: npm run build:operator-ui && npm --prefix orchestrator run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:operator-ui && npm --prefix orchestrator run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix orchestrator run typecheck && npm run typecheck:operator-ui
scripts.test: npm --prefix orchestrator run test:run && npm run test:operator-ui
scripts.docs:site:dev: npm run docs:site:sync && vitepress dev site
scripts.docs:site:build: npm run docs:site:sync && vitepress build site
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run docs:drift && npm run docs:links && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:operator-ui && npm run typecheck
